Bayanin shirin "Audio Chats na Audio".

1. Kafin ka fara.
2. Brief bayanin.
3. Jere jerin yarukan don sadarwa.
4. Abin da kuke buƙatar shirin don aiki.
5. Aiki tare da shirin.
5.1 sanyi.
5.4 bayanin martaba na wani sabon damar.
5.3 Sashe na Taimako.
5.4 Fita na Fita.
5.5 Jerin masu ma'amala.
56 Tarihi na Tarihi.

5.8 Share mai amfani.
5.9 Ganin bayanin martaba na mai linzami.
5.10 a tsaye a tsaye tsakanin bangarorin hagu da dama.
6. Bayan kun gama aiki.
Hover the linzamin kwamfuta a kan hoton mai magana a cikin ƙananan kusurwar dama ta allo da kuma danna dama Saiti Saiti Saita, kamar yadda Shawn cikin Hoto 1.
Hoto 1. Buɗe Saiti Sauti.

Allon tare da saitunan sauti na yanzu zai bayyana. Ka tuna abin da aka saita don shigar da na'urorin sauti na fitarwa. Kuna buƙatar wannan bayanin bayan kun gama aiki. A cikin Hoto na 2, kidan sun kiburai suna nuna abin da kuke buƙatar tunawa. A cikin yanayinku, sunayen zasu zama daban.
Hoto na 2. Saitunan sauti na farko
Saita na'urar fitarwa zuwa
Saita na'urar shigar da sauti zuwa
A cikin Hoto na 3, kibiya ja sun nuna abin da kuma kuna buƙatar saita.
Hoto na 3. Saƙon sauti
Tsarin tsarin yana kammala, zaku iya gudanar da shirin

Kuna magana da yaren da kuka sani, an ji ka cikin yaren rikonka ya fahimta. Log na colcversets ana kiyaye shi, wanda kuke cantage. Dukkanin ayyukan ana yin su cikin gida a kwamfutarka suna gudana Windows 10 ko Windows 11. Processor Processor mai kyawu ne, amma ba a buƙata ba, don shirin yin aiki. Ingancin fassarar yana inganta tare da processor Processor.

Idan kun fahimci ɗayan yarukan daga wannan jeri, zaku iya sadarwa tare da asalin asalin yaren daga wannan jerin. Sadarwa na iya zama a Telegragh, WhatsApp, Google gamuwa, VKMESSSSSSSSSSSSSSENER ko wani Manzo. Kuna iya sauraron labarai, hanya ta horo da duk wasu kwasfa a cikin kowane harsunan bada bashi da fahimce. Yanzu yana yiwuwa a ba da tambayoyi a cikin kamfanonin kasashen waje da ƙari da yawa. Hakanan zaka iya kunna fayil / bidiyo a cikin yaren waje kuma ji shi a cikin yare. Ofaya daga cikin aikace-aikacen ɓangare ne tattaunawa tare da wanda keɓaɓɓe a cikin harshe, amma mai zuwa kamfanin ku zai ji jigon jigon. Ba muryar ku. Tois wannan ya zama dole. Akwai aikace-aikace da yawa.
Mai aiki tsarin Windows 10 ko Windows 11.
Akwai sarari drive 8 GB.
Rago daga 10 GB.
GPU (rukunin aiki na zane) tare da 6 GB ko fiye, yana da kyau amma ba lallai ba ne.
Belun kunne tare da makirufo.
Dukkanin dubawa na aiki tare da shirin ne da za'ayi daga mai binciken.
Lokacin da ka danna maballin "sanyi", sannan ka samar da tsari tare da manyan sigogi masu aiki a cikin menu. Duba Hoto na 4.
Hoto 4. Kanfigareshation.
Sashen sanyi ya ƙunshi manyan sigogi masu aiki:
Harshe - saita yaren da kuke magana.
Sauti - Sunan direban don na'urar ta sauti.
Makirufo - sunan directuhon don makirufo.
Mai bincike na gidan yanar gizo - sunan mai binciken wanda za ku yi aiki.

Lokacin da ka canza harshe da ajiye saitunan sanyi, duk rubutu, maganganu, maɓallin maɓallin, da sauran rubutu za'a nuna a cikin sabon yaren. Ana fassara sabon huluna a cikin zaɓaɓɓen yare, kuma zaku ji magana a cikin wannan sabon yare. Muhimmin bayanin kula game da tsarin binciken gidan yanar gizo. Ta hanyar tsohuwa, an saita sigar gidan yanar gizo zuwa Microsoft Edge, tunda yana da kullun a cikin Windows. Don wannan siamer, zaɓi kawai mai binciken da aka shigar kuma yana gudana akan tsarin aikin ku.
Clicking sabon maballin yana nuna fom don cike gurbin agw. Duba Hoto na 5.
Hoto na 5. Sabon martaba
Sashe na "Sashen Saiti" yana dauke da babban sigogi masu aiki:
Sunan barkwanci - sunan da ka zaɓi kashin baya.
Harshe - Yaren da ke da damar shiga.
Bayanin - bayanin mai wucewa.
Yi amfani da makirufo - saita tutar amfani da makirufo.
Hoto - Saita gunkin don mai wucewa.
Idan baku zabi hoto don mai wucewa ba, za a yi amfani da hoton tsoho a gare shi.
"Yi amfani da makirufo" paramet coneteter conet don lokuta lokacin da kake sauraron (labarai, darasi na sauti, da sauransu).
"Taimako" ya bayyana yadda za a yi aiki tare da shirin a yare. Duba Hoto 6.
Hoto 6. Sashe na taimako.
Danna maɓallin "Fita" ya ƙare shirin. Duba Hoto 7.
Hoto na 7. Button fita.
Rufe taga mai bincike ko rufe mai binciken kuma ya kawo karshen shirin.
Sanannen shafin kuma ya ƙare shirin.
A gefen hagu na Browser jerin sunayen ku ne. Duba Hoto na 8.
Hoto na 8. Jerin masu ma'amala.

Ga kowane mai canzawa, gunkinsu, ranar saƙon ƙarshe, da kuma rubutu na ƙarshe a cikin yarenku ana nuna. Tsarin kwanan wata ya yi daidai da yarenku. Lokacin da ka danna maballin mai amfani, tarihin tattaunawar su.
Tarihin Tattaunawa na mai wucewa yana gefen dama na mai binciken. Duba Hoto 9.
Hoto na 9. Tarihin Tarihin Motoci.
Tarihin tattaunawar da ke canzawa na atomatik an yi amfani da shi Wen Ka danna kan masu kashewa a sashin hagu.
Babban menu ya ƙunshi:
Icon Interloclet
Sunan mai amfani
Maɓallin "Fara hira"
Maɓallin "bayyananniyar tarihi"
"Share mai canzawa" maballin "
Bayanin "bayanin martaba na"
Tarihin taɗi da aka zaɓa wanda aka zaɓa yana bayyana a sashin dama.
An ƙidaya taken taɗi tare da biyu daga cikin yaks: "Harshen ma'amala" / "Harshe".
Tashar taɗi ya ƙunshi "Share wannan maɓallin taɗi.
Lokacin da ka danna "Share wannan maɓallin" Share, ana share wannan tattaunawar daga tarihin tattaunawar masu linzami.
Duk saƙonni sun kasu kashi 2:
Saƙonni daga masu wucewa.
Saƙonninku.
Ana nuna saƙonni daga masu wucewa zuwa hagu. Saƙonninku suna canzawa zuwa dama.
Kowane rukuni na saƙo ya ƙunshi sassa 2:
Rubutun saƙo a cikin yaren da ke cikin Wakilin, launin wannan saƙon baƙi ne.
Rubutun saƙo a cikin yare, launi na wannan sakon yana kore.
Ranar nuni ya dace da yaren ku.
Sabon sakonni (da kwanan wata) suna ƙasa da ƙananan ɗakunan nesa.
A kasan arts na masu wucewa shine "Fara hira". Lokacin da ka danna shi, shirin yana fara yakan lalata makirufo da na'urar sauti don tantance matakan sigina / amo da nunawa saƙon.
Bayan ya kirkiro da na'urorin sauti, sunayen maballin canji: "Fara hira" -> "Tsaya hira".
Daga wannan gaba, zaku iya fara tattaunawa ko ƙaddamar da fayilolin sauti / bidiyo don layi zuwa.
Duk saƙonni masu shigowa (daga wani mutumin) zai bayyana a hagu.
Duk saƙonnin waje (daga gare ku) zasu bayyana a hannun dama.
Za ku ji saƙonni a cikin yarenku kuma mutumin da kuke ji saƙonni a cikin yarensu.
A ƙarshen tattaunawar / Sauraren bidiyon, kuna buƙatar danna ɗayan "dakatarwar tattaunawar".
Har ila yau, tattaunawar ta ƙare lokacin da:
Latsa wani mutum a hannun hagu na mai binciken a cikin jerin masu ma'amala.
Danna maɓallin "New" a saman jerin masu ma'amala.
Danna maɓallin "Taimako" a cikin saman menu.
Latsa maɓallin "bayyananniyar Tarihi" a cikin saman menu.
Danna kan "Share maballin" a cikin saman menu.
Ta danna kan "bayanin martaba na" Motoci "a cikin babban menu.
Ta danna maballin "Fita" a cikin saman menu.
Nunin saƙonni a cikin tarihin taɗi da aka iya bushewa ta hanyar zaɓin zaɓi na saƙon a cikin ɓangaren hagu na menu na menu (Green Arrow).
Lokacin zaɓi "Duk yaruka" - Saƙonnin Mord na MOTOCOLE kuma kun nuna saƙonnin a cikin dukkan yaruka.
Lokacin da zaɓar "yare na" - saƙonnin MOTOCOLOVE kuma kuna saƙonnin kawai a cikin yarenku.
Lokacin da zaɓar "yaren moblolovel" - saƙonnin MOTOCOLOVE ne kawai a cikin yaren da ke canzawa.
Yanayin nuni na nuni shine "duk yare".
Lokacin danna maɓallin "Tarihi" Tarihi ", ana share duk hulɗa tare da mai canzawa, amma an cire kewayawa. Duba Hoto 10.
Hoto 10
Idan hira tare da mai wucewa yanzu yana ci gaba, ya tsaya.
Danna maɓallin "Share mai wucewa" maɓallin yana share duk ma'amala tare da mai wucewa da mai amfani da kansa. Duba Hoto 11.
Adadi 11. Share mai wucewa.
Idan hira tare da mai wucewa yanzu yana ci gaba, ya tsaya.
Latsa bayanin martabar "Cibiyar Motoci" Maɓallin yana nuna wani nau'i cike da bayanan masu linzami. Duba Hoto na 12.
Hoto na 12. Duba bayanan bayanan masu linzami.
Wannan abun yayi kama da abun
Mai raba shi a tsaye yana ba ku damar canza fadin hagu da dama na wuraren aiki. Duba Hoto 13.
Hoto na 13. A tsaye rabawa na hagu da sassa dama.
Lokacin da ka matsar da mai raba ido, an ajiye matsayin sa. Lokacin da kuka sake kunna shirin, matsayin da kuka saita za a dawo da shi.
Matsar da siginar linzamin kwamfuta akan hoton mai magana a cikin ƙananan kusurwar dama ta allo da danna-dama, zaɓi da "buɗe saƙon sauti", kamar yadda aka nuna a hoto 14.
Hoto na 14. Buɗe saitunan sauti.
Allon tare da saitunan sauti na yanzu zai bayyana.
Hoto na 15. Saitunan sauti na yanzu.
Mayar da kyawawan dabi'un da suka kasance kafin fara aikin. A cikin yanayinku, sunayen zasu zama daban.
Hoto na 16. Saitunan sauti na farko.
An dawo da saitunan tsarin, zaku iya aiki a cikin Windows.
